topStories.description: Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan slammed Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and threatened to invade Israel. The development comes as high-stakes talks between the US and Iran in Islamabad failed to reach an agreement.

dailyNews.description: All six board members that oversee the national historic landmark were terminated, part of the administration’s efforts to reshape the federal bureaucracy.

dailyNews.title: Cuba’s President Projects Defiance in Standoff With the U.S.
dailyNews.description: Miguel Díaz-Canel’s stance on “Meet the Press” reflected how Cuba is digging in against pressure from a Trump administration distracted by the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s War With Iran Has Weakened America
dailyNews.description: The president should at long last recognize the ineptitude of his impulsive, go-it-alone approach.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. will blockade Strait of Hormuz, intercept ships that paid Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump said the U.S. Navy will begin blockading ships from entering or exiting the Strait of Hormuz and intercept vessels that have paid tolls to Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. to blockade ships in Strait of Hormuz after failed peace talks
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance told reporters that "we have not reached an agreement" following face-to-face talks with Iranian leaders and Pakistani negotiators.

dailyNews.title: Warner says he'll "take a look" at Trump funding request for Iran war
dailyNews.description: Democratic Sen. Mark Warner said "I'll take a look at anything" when asked whether he would oppose additional funding for the war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: CBS News poll finds few see U.S. goals being met in Iran yet
dailyNews.description: Gas prices put pressure on pocketbooks — and President Trump's ratings — as Iran war continues.
